THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIERIOT, JOHN DADE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREG, INC. $4,165,509.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,165,509.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT BREG, INC.- DAMAGES BROKEN DOWN AS FOLLOWS: PAST ECONOMIC DAMAGES $250,509, FUTURE ECONOMIC DAMAGES $115,000, PAST NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES $2,280,000, FUTURE NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES $1,520,000. FURTHER, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS PAUL ROACHE, M.D., HARBOR MEDICAL SERVICES LLC, SPORTS BRACING USA, INC AND CHRIS NEWHARD AGAINST PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
